parameters.text:
⭐ *How was your experience?*

We'd love to hear your feedback on Job #{{ $json.jobId }}!

Please reply with a rating (1-5) and any comments.

Your feedback helps us improve! 🙏

parameters.name: description
parameters.value: Client {{ $json.clientName }} notified of job #{{ $json.jobId }} status change: {{ $json.oldStatus }} → {{ $json.newStatus }}
